---
name: Security report
about: Do not file public security reports here
title: "[Security] Do not submit"
labels: security
assignees: ""
---

Please do not submit public security reports in GitHub issues.

Follow the private reporting process in `SECURITY.md` instead. Include only the information needed to reproduce or assess the issue, and do not post tokens, signing materials, private keys, certificates, `.env` files, private model credentials, or private run artifacts publicly.
